zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Lothrop於1677年11月23日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波時，她的父親Melatiah Lothrop31歲，母親Sarah Farrar29歲。她於1696年12月17日與Hope Lathrop在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1763年2月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾托藍德托藍德 特享年85歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾托藍德托藍德 特。

nameMeanings.name: Lothrop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lowthorpe in East Yorkshire, named with the Old Norse personal name Logi or Lági + thorp ‘outlying farmstead’.

History: In 1634 the name was brought to North America by the Rev. John Lathrop (born 1584 in Etton, Yorkshire, England), a Puritan preacher fleeing religious persecution. He arrived in Plymouth Colony and lived in Scituate, MA, until 1639, then moved to Barnstable, MA, where his Bible can still be seen.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Lothrop was born on 23 November 1677, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Melatiah Lothrop, was 31 and her mother, Sarah Farrar, was 29. She married Hope Lathrop on 17 December 1696, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 21 February 1763, in Tolland Center, Tolland, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 85, and was buried in Tolland Center, Tolland, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Lothrop(이)가 1677년 11월 23일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Melatiah Lothrop(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Farrar(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1696년 12월 17일 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 Hope Lathrop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1763년 2월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 톨랜드 톨랜드 세터에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 톨랜드 톨랜드 세터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Lothrop родилась 23 ноября 1677 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Melatiah Lothrop было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Farrar, 29. Она умерла 21 февраля 1763 г. в местности толланд кентир, толланд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности толланд кентир, толланд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
